creator: marklmi26-fbsd@yahoo.com
text:
I've been updating a DESTDIR for 11.0 installkernel installworld as I go along updating. Its path is:

/usr/obj/DESTDIRs/clang-rpi2-installkernelworld/

which will show up later in this note.

I use delete-old and delete-old-libs as I go along. The history goes back into 11.0-CURRENT to well before libsoft was added for the change to the floating point handling.

This is an amd64 -> armv6 cross build context.

I tried also making a independent new directory tree via another install<?> use with a different DESTDIR from the same stable/11 -r304029 build. Doing a diff -r of the directory trees reported a bunch of files as only in the tree referenced explicitly above:
(I omit some other mixed-in messages about other things: I list ". . ." in those places below.)
